brief_nursing_elaboration: Allergic/contact skin inflammation. Nursing: allergen identification, topical treatment application, skin integrity assessment, pruritus management.
Voice box inflammation. Nursing: voice rest support, throat lozenges/sprays, hydration, hoarseness assessment, airway monitoring.
Gum inflammation from plaque/infection. Nursing: oral hygiene education, antimicrobial rinse recommendation, bleeding gums assessment, dental referral.
Tonsil infection/inflammation. Nursing: throat swabs, throat culture collection, antipyretic admin, throat comfort measures, swallowing difficulty.
Airway inflammation with productive cough. Nursing: airway clearance support, hydration optimization, cough suppressant admin, respiratory assessment.
Cervical inflammation from STI/infection. Nursing: STI screening coordination, discharge assessment, sexual health education, antibiotic admin.
Ureter inflammation from infection/stones. Nursing: hydration optimization, urinalysis monitoring, analgesic admin, stone passage assessment.
Glucose excretion indicating hyperglycemia/diabetes. Nursing: blood glucose monitoring, urinalysis serial, diabetes education, medication review.
Heart rate >100 bpm from stress/infection/cardiac disease. Nursing: ECG monitoring, anxiety assessment, fluid status evaluation, medication review.
Heart rate <60 bpm from cardiac/neurological causes. Nursing: pacemaker readiness, dizziness assessment, ECG monitoring, medication adjustment.
Intrathoracic bleeding from trauma/surgery. Nursing: chest tube management, transfusion readiness, vital sign monitoring, breath sound assessment.
Secondary cancer growth beyond primary site. Nursing: staging assessment, palliative/curative treatment, pain management, emotional/spiritual support.
Intravascular clot from endothelial damage/stasis. Nursing: anticoagulation therapy, leg assessment, DVT/PE precautions, activity tolerance monitoring.
Swallowing difficulty from stroke/esophageal pathology. Nursing: diet texture modification, feeding tube coordination, aspiration precaution, swallow study orders.
CNS membrane inflammation from bacterial/viral. Nursing: bacterial culture, antibiotics admin, seizure precautions, headache/neck stiffness assessment, isolation precautions.
Esophageal inflammation/ulceration. Nursing: NPO or soft diet, antacid/PPI admin, pain assessment, swallowing difficulty evaluation, endoscopy coordination.
Joint pain from arthritis/injury without visible inflammation. Nursing: pain assessment, NSAIDs, heat/ice therapy, ROM exercises, mobility support.
Laboratory examination of urine for abnormalities. Nursing: proper specimen collection, clean-catch technique, result interpretation, follow-up testing coordination.
Respiratory rate >20 breaths/min from fever/anxiety/hypoxia. Nursing: O2 sat monitoring, respiratory assessment, underlying cause investigation, anxiety management.
Respiratory rate <12 breaths/min from medication/CNS depression. Nursing: O2 therapy, respiratory monitoring, stimulation if needed, medication review.
Spinal inflammation from infection/autoimmune. Nursing: back pain assessment, imaging coordination, antibiotics/NSAIDs, mobility assistance, neurological checks.

literal_translation: Inflammation of bone and bone marrow
brief_nursing_elaboration: Bone/marrow infection from bacterial infection. Nursing: blood culture collection, IV antibiotics, pain management, limb elevation, infection precautions.
Peripheral nerve damage from diabetes/infection/trauma. Nursing: sensory assessment, pain management, foot care education, fall prevention, medication review.
Kidney disease from diabetes/hypertension. Nursing: renal function monitoring, BP control, proteinuria assessment, dietary management, fluid restriction education.
Heart disease from various etiologies. Nursing: cardiac output monitoring, medication management, activity tolerance assessment, weight monitoring, SOB evaluation.
Liver disease from cirrhosis/hepatitis. Nursing: LFT monitoring, ammonia levels, ascites assessment, bleeding precautions, dietary protein modification.
Joint disease from osteoarthritis/rheumatoid arthritis. Nursing: pain management, ROM exercises, mobility aids, weight reduction education, medication adherence.
Small intestine inflammation from infection/food. Nursing: dietary management, diarrhea relief, hydration maintenance, electrolyte monitoring, underlying cause identification.
Rectal inflammation from IBD/infection. Nursing: rectal pain relief, bowel function assessment, dietary modification, hemorrhoid care if applicable.
Urethral inflammation from STI/UTI. Nursing: dysuria relief, STI screening, antibiotic admin, fluid intake encouragement, sexual health counseling.
Joint immobilization/fusion surgery. Nursing: post-op pain management, immobilization compliance, ROM limitations, mobility device training, rehabilitation coordination.
Surgical opening of joint for repair/visualization. Nursing: post-op wound care, infection prevention, pain management, ROM rehabilitation, suture removal timing.
Male sterilization procedure. Nursing: pre-op counseling, post-op pain/swelling management, activity restrictions, follow-up semen analysis coordination.
Breast removal for cancer/prophylaxis. Nursing: body image support, pain management, lymphedema precautions, drain management, reconstruction options discussion.
Stomach removal for cancer/ulcer. Nursing: post-op nutrition management, dumping syndrome precautions, small frequent meals, vitamin supplementation, wound care.

literal_translation: Surgical opening of colon to skin
brief_nursing_elaboration: Bowel diversion with stoma creation. Nursing: ostomy care, appliance fitting, dietary guidance, skin protection, emotional support, rehabilitation.
